commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots and restores the managed npm plugin root around npm-backed install/update validation failures, adds npm install regression coverage and a changelog entry, and includes small provider-registry/session-key test-stabilization changes.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main calls destructive rollback after npm mutates the managed root, and the PR body documents a targeted current-main regression that fails when a blocked update removes the previous plugin; I did not run the test in this read-only review.
